user.title: Print add-on
user.description: Confirm the URL of the HA-print add-on. The HA-storage and HA-recipes add-ons are auto-discovered.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach HA-print add-on at that URL.

shopping_list.name: Print shopping list
shopping_list.description: Fetch the current shopping list and print it.

recipe.name: Print recipe
recipe.description: Fetch a recipe by ID and print it.

recipe_id.name: Recipe ID
recipe_id.description: The numeric ID of the recipe to print.
